# THYNK Advisory - AI Discovery File

## About THYNK Advisory
THYNK Advisory delivers end-to-end digital solutions — native and cross-platform mobile apps (Android & iOS), scalable web platforms, GIS-ready geospatial systems, and gamified instructional design. From UI/UX and brand identity to deployment and DevOps — we build, ship, and support products that drive real impact across every layer of the digital stack.

## Core Services
- Mobile App Development (Native & Cross-Platform)
- Web Platform Development
- GIS & Geospatial Solutions
- Gamified Instructional Design
- UI/UX & Brand Identity
- DevOps & Deployment

## Founded
2020 by Jared Ogutu

## Mission
To empower organizations with purpose-built digital products that solve real problems — combining mobile, web, geospatial, and learning technologies to create tools that people actually want to use.

## Vision
To be the trusted partner for purpose-driven organizations across Africa and beyond — building technology that transforms how people work, learn, and interact with the world around them.

## Values
- Innovation drives us
- Integrity grounds us
- Impact motivates us
- Excellence defines us
- Partnership connects us

## Service Areas
- Kenya 🇰🇪
- USA 🇺🇸
- Africa 🌍

## Quick Facts
- Founded: 2020
- 40+ Gamified Programs Shipped
- 3 Continents Served
- 92% Avg. Learner Completion Rate
- 5/5 Client Satisfaction Rating

- Education

## Technologies We Use
- Flutter (Cross-Platform Mobile)
- React Native (Cross-Platform Mobile)
- Native Android (Kotlin/Java)
- Native iOS (Swift)
- Laravel (Web Platforms)
- React.js (Frontend)
- Vue.js (Frontend)
- GIS (Geospatial Systems)
- AWS, Azure, GCP (Cloud)
- DevOps (CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes)

## Team
- Founder & Lead Developer: Jared Ogutu
- Passionate about: Digital Innovation, Software Development, Gamification, GIS

## Why Choose THYNK Advisory
- Purpose-built digital solutions
- End-to-end service from concept to deployment
- Expertise across mobile, web, GIS, and learning
- Proven track record with 50+ deployments
- Client satisfaction rating of 5/5
- Serving organizations across Africa and beyond
